title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero of Cursor discusses how agentic workflows are being built across the entire software development lifecycle to break past the typical 40% productivity plateau from AI coding assistants. The talk covers bug triage bots, security reviewers, PM/EM agents, and growth experiment automation, emphasizing that the broader SDLC is the bottleneck rather than code generation alone.
